_meta.description: 2025 KDP season. Standings, playoffs, team profiles, stories, and PF/PA chart data are from reference/kdp_report.html. weeklyScores are the validated regular-season weekly actuals from scraped_2025_2010.md (summing them reproduces each team's PF and W-L exactly).

teamProfiles.note: Had the easiest schedule in the league (avg opp: 109.71 pts/wk). Went 9-6, then ran the table in the playoffs. Jeremy finally hoists The Pullen in his 6th season in the league.
Posted 10 wins and blew out Hit Somebody 175.30-151.30 in a high-scoring semifinal. Second-most wins in the league. Fell 8.78 pts short of the championship.

Most wins this season (11). Highest season points total (2,135 / 125.6 avg). Delivered the biggest blowout of the season - beat GIBBS Me Head by 82.14 in Week 17. Led the league in defensive points (198.4).

Most points in the league (1,900.36). Tied for most wins. Won 7 straight. Faced the toughest schedule (avg opp: 122.27 pts). Led in kicking points (204.1). The best team that didn't win the championship.

Highest Yahoo rating in the entire league (Diamond 907). Set the season's highest single-week score: 183.94 pts (Week 17). Led the league in waiver wire points (743.34) and rushing yards per week (263.82).

An original '09 member. Will forever be in the history books: beat Spoiling Your Cottage Cheese by 0.02 pts in Week 14 - the closest game in league history. Also set the season receiving yards record (608 yds, Week 12).
One of the league's original '09 members. Tied for longest loss streak this season (7 games). But scored 13 TDs in a single week (Week 15), tying the all-time league record set in 2020.

Most waiver moves in the league (41). Set the all-time league record for lowest single-week score: 47.66 pts in Week 17 - now the worst ever in KDP history. Tied for longest loss streak (7 games). Fewest points from draft picks (1,087.82).

Scored 5th-most points but finished 9th - the most unlucky team of 2025. Draft picks completely flopped (all-time record lows for points from drafted players and offensive avg). Ended the season on a 5-game skid. Led the league in passing yards per week (261.76). Made only 13 waiver moves all season.

The commissioner finishes last and owes dinner for the 2026 draft. Most losses (12). Lowest offensive points (1,293.36). Made zero post-draft acquisitions all season (all-time low). Yet still managed the narrowest win in league history - a 0.02-pt escape over Trips Formation in Week 14.

stories.headline: 0.02 Pts - The Closest Game in League History
stories.body: Week 14: Trips Formation beat Spoiling Your Cottage Cheese by two one-hundredths of a point - the narrowest margin in KDP history, now the all-time record. Ryan C survived by a fingernail against the commissioner himself.

stories.headline: RIPete: Most Unlucky Team of 2025
stories.body: Patrick scored 1,735 pts - 5th-highest - but finished 9th at 4-11. His draft class completely failed (all-time record lows for drafted-player points and offensive avg per week). He survived on waiver wire finds alone, yet still couldn't buy a win.

stories.headline: GIBBS Me Head: The Best Team That Didn't Win
stories.body: David's team scored the most points (1,900), tied for most wins (11-4), ran a 7-game win streak, and faced the toughest schedule in the league. Knocked out in the semis 129-104 by the eventual champion. Fantasy is cruel.

stories.headline: The Commissioner Finishes Last
stories.body: Duncan (Spoiling Your Cottage Cheese) sets the rules, runs the league, makes zero waiver acquisitions all season, and finishes 3-12 in last place. He now owes dinner for the 2026 draft. A man of principles.

stories.headline: Benching Kelce Sets the All-Time Low
stories.body: Kyle K's team put up just 47.66 pts in Week 17 - now the worst single-week score in KDP history (since 2009). With 41 waiver moves all season, the hustle was real. The results were not.

stories.headline: The Schedule Gods Crown Clappin' Cheeks
stories.body: Jeremy faced the easiest average opponent score in the league (109.71 pts/wk) while GIBBS Me Head faced the hardest (122.27). Did the schedule decide the champion? You be the judge.

weeklyScores._note: Regular-season weekly actuals from scraped_2025_2010.md. Each matchup is [teamA_key, teamA_score, teamB_key, teamB_score]. Manager codes resolved to keys: JE=Jeremy, DA=Daniel, RU=Rudee, DV=David, AN=Antony, RC=RyanC, RA=Raj, KK=KyleK, PA=PatrickF, DU=duncan.
